chunks.title: Conquest of Arad and Hormah
chunks.reason: A complete narrative unit describing the conflict with the Canaanite king and the resulting vow.

chunks.title: The Fiery Serpents and Bronze Serpent
chunks.reason: A coherent narrative block covering the people's complaint, the plague of serpents, and the remedy.

chunks.title: Journey to Moab and Song of the Well
chunks.reason: A travel itinerary interspersed with a specific song celebrating the well.

chunks.title: Defeat of Sihon King of the Amorites
chunks.reason: A complete narrative arc involving diplomatic negotiation, battle, and the poetic record of victory.

chunks.title: Conquest of Jazer and Bashan
chunks.reason: A concluding narrative segment detailing the capture of Jazer and the defeat of Og.
